name: Underdog
additional_info: Underdog grants a 2.5% damage buff at 20 Willpower, this is increased by 0.0375% damage per Willpower above 20, capping at 4% with 60 Willpower. Grants a 2.875% damage buff at requirements. "Higher HP" refers to current HP.
desc: You deal 2.5% more damage to those with higher HP than you, scaling up to 4% at 60 WLL. Additionally, you deal +10% more damage to physically larger foes.
